name: foundation
description: Pure-infrastructure base module. Owns the cross-cutting model traits (HasSystemFlag, HasUserstamps, HasAuditable, HasVersions, HasMetadata, Sortable, Filterable, Sluggable, Searchable, HasVectorEmbeddings), the paired migration macros, base HTTP + exception + job + repository primitives, the health aggregator + probe registry, module discovery + ModuleRouteLoader, cache tag namespaces, base error envelope, data-classification taxonomy, and the compliance regime taxonomy every downstream module inherits. Ships zero domain entities — the module is entity-less on purpose. API + payload versioning has moved to `modules/versioning/` (Wave 1). Import / export substrate has moved to `modules/transfer/` (Wave 2). Wave 0: every other module depends on this one.

api.version.middleware.reason: API + payload + webhook versioning are all instances of surface-level version lifecycle — same concern. Versioning module owns the ApiVersion entity + resolver chain + deprecation workflow + payload transformer registry. Foundation retains the base HTTP pipeline (request.id, response.envelope, throttle.base, cors.strict); versioning slots in at priority 30 between cors and throttle.

central.description: Public health surface + module discovery for platform ops.
